title: Phase 7D Proof Bundle — Real Model Layer
gate: Phase 7D must close with proof before Phase 7E starts

prerequisite_merges.title: P7D-01: Wire scoring to champion model registry
P7D-03: Shadow-vs-champion comparison via experiment ledger
P7D-04: Governed shadow comparison read surface

assertions.claim: Runtime scoring references a concrete model registry entry

evidence.metadata_consumption: candidate-scoring-service.ts:143-144 reads champion.metadata for sharp_weight and movement_weight, passes to computeModelBlend
evidence.placeholder_removed: computeModelBlend no longer uses (devig, devig, 0, 0) when champion exists — uses champion-sourced weights

assertions.claim: Band/tier decisions no longer depend on fake fixed confidence

evidence.champion_path: candidate-scoring-service.ts:149-153 — confidence from championMeta?.['confidence'] or DEFAULT_CHAMPION_CONFIDENCE=0.75; uncertainty = 1 - confidence
evidence.no_hardcoded_in_champion_path: The only 0.2 reference (line 164) is in the else branch — explicitly for 'legacy fallback when no registry', commented as Phase 7E cleanup target
evidence.model_confidence_derived: candidate-scoring-service.ts:170 — model_confidence = Math.max(0, 1 - uncertainty), derived from champion metadata not hardcoded
evidence.fail_closed: When champion has no confidence metadata, DEFAULT_CHAMPION_CONFIDENCE=0.75 is used (explicit, not hidden)

assertions.claim: Shadow and champion outputs are recorded side-by-side

evidence.recording_path: candidate-scoring-service.ts:277-315 recordShadowComparison() creates experiment ledger entry with run_type='shadow_comparison'
evidence.metrics_recorded: experimentLedger.complete() receives: candidateId, championModelId, championModelName, championScore, championTier, shadowScore (null placeholder), comparisonType
evidence.trigger: candidate-scoring-service.ts:186-190 — called for every scored candidate when champion exists and experimentLedger is available

assertions.claim: Shadow remains informational until intentionally promoted

evidence.no_routing_consumption: grep 'shadowScore|shadow_comparison' in promotion-service.ts and distribution-service.ts returns 0 matches (exit 1)
evidence.read_only_surface: routes/shadow-models.ts handleShadowComparison is a GET-only handler — returns experiment ledger entries, does not write or alter state
evidence.comparison_type: Metrics record comparisonType='champion_only' — shadow score is null placeholder until a shadow runner is implemented
evidence.no_promotion_effect: Shadow data is never read by promotion-service.ts, distribution-service.ts, or board-pick-writer.ts

phase_7d_gate_verdict: PASS — all 4 assertions hold. Phase 7D real model layer is complete.
